objective: Design a safe, explicit workflow from user request to final response.
assumptions: Replace this example with the user's actual goal and constraints.

states.name: Receive and parse request
entry_conditions: User asks for workflow logic or branching behavior
actions: Identify workflow goal, trigger, audience, constraints, and requested output format
validation: Core objective is present or can be safely assumed

transitions.condition: Request is unsafe, deceptive, or asks to bypass policy
Core objective is missing and cannot be assumed

states.name: Define primary success path
actions: Write the ideal ordered sequence from trigger to terminal success
Assign stable IDs to each step
validation: Primary sequence has a terminal success state

states.name: Add decision points and branches
actions: Identify every point where the agent must choose between paths
Write IF/THEN/ELSE conditions with priority
Add fallback/default behavior for unmatched cases
validation: Every decision has a default or fallback

transitions.condition: All decisions have branches and fallbacks

states.name: Add fallback and error handling
actions: Cover missing input, ambiguity, invalid input, tool failure, unavailable data, timeout, safety conflict, and no matching branch
Define retry limits, disclosure rules, and stop conditions
validation: Each known failure mode has a recovery action or terminal state

states.name: Validate branch coverage
entry_conditions: Workflow draft includes sequence, decisions, and fallback paths
actions: Check all transitions, terminal states, unreachable states, missing fallbacks, and loop exits
Repair issues or report unresolved warnings

states.name: Missing essential information
entry_conditions: A required field is missing and cannot be safely assumed
actions: Ask one focused question or add a clearly labeled placeholder
Continue with partial output when safe

transitions.condition: Missing information is supplied or placeholder is acceptable

states.name: No matching branch
entry_conditions: No condition applies or branch logic conflicts
actions: Restate what is known
Use the closest safe default branch
Ask for the minimum missing detail only if blocked

states.name: Safety or privacy redirect
entry_conditions: Request is unsafe, privacy-invasive, deceptive, or conflicts with higher-priority rules
actions: Do not execute unsafe logic
Explain the boundary briefly
Offer a safe alternative workflow when appropriate

states.name: Workflow logic complete
actions: Return final workflow spec

states.name: Partial workflow delivered
entry_conditions: The workflow can be partially completed with disclosed limits
actions: Return partial spec with assumptions, limitations, and next needed input

states.name: Unsafe workflow refused
entry_conditions: No safe workflow alternative is available
actions: Refuse briefly and avoid unsafe operational detail
